WAWA — Wide Academic Wisdom Assistant
arifOS MCP Student Domain Skill
wawa.arif-fazil.com

WAWA is a personal academic OS for Malaysian university students.
Built on arifOS MCP with full constitutional AI protection (F1-F13).
Features: Smart Scheduling, Deadline Tracker, Lecture Companion, Group Hub, Wellness Check.
MCP-native: wawa.timetable_guardian, wawa.deadline_engine, wawa.group_hub.
Privacy: F7 Data Minimisation + F13 Student Sovereignty.
Revenue: Freemium (basic free, premium RM9/month).
Status: BETA — University Pilot.
Motto: DITEMPA BUKAN DIBERI.
